standard: ISO 15:2017 boundary dimensions, 6000-series open deep groove bearing rows
description: Open single-row deep groove ball bearing with coupled 6000-6005 boundary dimensions, distinct inner ring, outer ring, ball row, and simplified cage.
source: ISO 15:2017 boundary-dimension basis; provided 6000-series d/D/B table; SKF 6000 dimension sheet; TraceParts 6000 reference images calibrate only the 6000 ball count/ball diameter/pitch diameter baseline; raceways/cage and 6001-6005 internals are proportion-based
